title: Xbox withdraws funding for RPG Project Fantasy and causes layoffs at IO Interactive
summary: The studio behind Hitman and 007 is forced to cut staff after Microsoft's sudden withdrawal from the project, although they assure the game remains in development.

title: Sony announces end of physical disc production for PlayStation starting in 2028
summary: The Japanese company will stop manufacturing physical games for all its consoles, driving the transition to digital format.

title: Microsoft considers closing Arkane Studios and canceling Blade game
summary: According to multiple reports, the company is considering shuttering the studio behind Dishonored and halting development of Marvel's Blade as part of its restructuring.

title: The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered arrives on Nintendo Switch 2 in August with physical edition
summary: The enhanced version of Bethesda's classic RPG will launch on August 11 in cartridge format for Nintendo's new console.

title: Sony will close PS3 and PS Vita digital stores in July 2027
summary: The company confirms the end of PlayStation Store for older consoles, marking the end of an era for those systems.

title: Critics praise Rhythm Heaven Groove as a worthy swan song for Nintendo Switch
summary: Reviews agree that the new rhythm game maintains the essence of the series and bids farewell to the console with a fun and original title.

title: Mario Kart World receives update 1.7.0 with new routes for Knockout Tour
summary: Nintendo adds two new courses and several improvements in the latest patch for the Switch racing game.

title: Splatoon Raiders is shaping up to be Nintendo's promising single-player shooter
summary: Previews and details of the new cooperative action game point to a fresh experience with hints of Monster Hunter.

title: Rockstar workers denounce abusive working conditions and demand a union
summary: Employees of the British studio seek union recognition while crunch practices and gender pay gaps are revealed.

title: Love and Deepspace cancels its new love interest Valko after fan backlash
summary: The dating game developer backs down and removes the character due to strong negative community reaction.

title: Kojima's horror game OD is not in danger despite Xbox cuts
summary: Microsoft assures that the Japanese creator's project continues and will not be affected by its internal restructuring.

title: ESA backtracks and Stop Killing Games movement suffers a setback
summary: After labeling private servers for Minecraft and Call of Duty as illegal, the association qualifies its statements as the initiative loses momentum.

title: Guns of Eschaton, the final game by Half-Life 2 art director Viktor Antonov
summary: The title, a soulslike shooter set in the Wild West, will be published posthumously and has been revealed after his death.

title: Steam Machine continues to generate excitement among hardware enthusiasts
summary: From custom front plates to teardowns and reviews, Valve's console ecosystem maintains community interest.

title: EA backs down on several decisions about Battlefield 6 after communication errors
summary: The company reverses changes to XP boosters and free access, causing confusion among players.

title: Helldivers 2 returns with a political campaign inspired by Trump's wall
summary: The Frontlines of Freedom update introduces a new campaign to 'make the galaxy safe again' satirizing political discourse.

title: Xbox unions denounce uncertainty amid mass layoffs at Microsoft
summary: Organized workers criticize the lack of information and broken promises of job protection amid the restructuring.

title: Original Baldur's Gate designer refuses to make the fourth installment for fear of competing with Larian
summary: James Ohlen states that he would not want to face the success of Baldur's Gate 3 and prefers not to get involved in a new sequel.

title: Godot engine bans AI-generated code contributions due to lack of reliability
summary: Developers of the open-source engine believe that AI assistants do not guarantee code quality and understanding, so they will ban them.

title: GTA 6 dominates pre-orders and leads PlayStation Store charts worldwide
summary: Rockstar's highly anticipated title tops pre-order charts in most countries, while details about its subscription system are revealed.
